message:
🌱 Move font controls left of swarm with spacing (#154)

Repositions −/size/+ controls to the left of the swarm globe icon
with a 12px spacer to prevent accidental clicks.

Fix live font size: use double-rAF + term.refresh() so xterm.js fully
renders new font glyphs before fitAddon measures cell dimensions.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
